title: The Aftermath of Egghead
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Nami, Unknown person #3, Bonney, Vegapunk as Egghead’s aftermath reshapes the world: Vegapunk’s truth spreads, Saturn faces consequences, and the route toward Elbaf opens.
scene: Egghead’s aftermath reshapes the world: Vegapunk’s truth spreads, Saturn faces consequences, and the route toward Elbaf opens.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's next for the Marines still left standing???

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: load the Seraphim as soon as they're charged!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As for the weaponized sea beasts and mark III PacificISTA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, Rob Lucci- San!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Kaku- San!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Wait... where's Stussy- San?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: killed in action.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WHAT?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We obtained everything...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...we set out for.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: with York, punk records and the power station in hand...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have secured access to the eternal mother flame.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that result would have been more than adequate...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But we had one critical hiccup.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We're terribly sorry, sir!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is a disgrace that we failed to capture jewelry Bonney and the straw hat crew!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Even with our grand buster call fleet...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...the nine of us vice admirals couldn't get the job done!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please give us leave to pursue them to Elbaf!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: No, forget Elbaf.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The failure to which I refer is far more dire.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Allowing vegapunk's message to play was an unexpected disaster...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Not to mention...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...that iron giant surfacing to aid in the Pirates escape...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...It's ironic really...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Roughly 200 years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But Saint Saturn! We've already received orders to scrap it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will take responsibility should this be uncovered. Now, do as I bid and study it thoroughly!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Really?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This... is the future!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am certain it will ultimately prove to be a great asset to our military might!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Aftermath through 31 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
